package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_compare_equal_zero: `bytes.Compare(...) == 0` instead of `bytes.Equal(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario448Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Compare(left, right) == 0
}
